title: Toxicc's Totem
description: Is this Totem really toxic if it's just deepslate and sculk?
body:
## Description:
This Minecraft texture pack makes Totems of Undying have deepslate instead of gold, and diamonds instead of emeralds. Also, its left side seems to be corrupted with sculk.

## Terms of Use:
If you are making a type of resource pack that uses this one, such as another texture pack, then message me through Planet Minecraft or Discord about use (Discord: timewithtoxicc). If you are using the pack in social media, link my Planet Minecraft profile link and the pack's link in the description. Lastly, do not claim ownership of the pack, or re-upload it. That is all.
